parsed_review.summary: CP00-292 is a clean descriptor-only closeout pack for the RP08 email/DMS core failure binding slice (RP08.P07.M05.S15-RP08.P07.M06.S02, risk A, 10 units). The pack binding, deliverable distribution {hermes_evidence:2,fixture:1,test:2,security_audit:1,claude_review:1,implementation:1,failure_recovery:2}, and micro-title distribution {Permission And Audit Binding:8,Synthetic Fixture Set:2} are identical across the live plan (closeout-pack-plan.json:411), manifest, registry CP292 binding, contract projection (failure_binding_slice_descriptor), and validator coverage checks. CP00-292 is the current live cursor (upstream CP00-291 just committed). The implementation builds only frozen plain descriptor objects with zero runtime imports (no child_process/fs/net/http/db/fetch in packages/email-dms/src); ~40 no-write/no-runtime attestation flags are false (no email/office/sync/filing/AI runtime, no audit/state/object-storage writes, no Hermes runtime receipt, no command runtime, no rollback/retry, no lock acquisition, no real fixture data), and per-row guards (blocked_claim_detail_included=false, real_client_data_loaded=false, executes_unit_test_runtime_paths=false, dispatches_integration_smoke_runtime=false, audit_hint_detail_included=false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, claude_final_approval_claimed=false, human_approval_route_required_before_runtime=true, missing_tenant_failure expected_outcome=rejected_customer_safe) are present and validated. Claude is held as a read-only reviewer and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, allowed_tools=[Read,Grep,Glob]); enterprise trust is not claimed from local validation. Hermes control-plane patterns are confined to deterministic evidence/review-packet identity (receipt_shape descriptor_only_..._no_write). CP178+ review-evidence hardening blockers (auth failure, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, disabled tools, missing raw-output/source-inspection refs, final-approval/source-mutation/enterprise-trust claims) are encoded and the readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON. The production_ready claim is appropriately conservative (manifest production_ready=false; descriptor-verified flag; candidate gated behind human approval at CP00-293), and all 20 implementation/contract/plan/repo validation commands are recorded at exit 0. Changed-file scope is exact (7 modified tracked impl files plus export-* index.js); unrelated dirty/untracked files are correctly preserved and not inferred into the pack. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present, which is the expected pre-commit state per the hardening sequence. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues found; pack is supported for closeout subject to the normal human final approval step.
